name: Lemon-Dilly Chicken Saute
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breasts, halves, boned and skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken pieces until they're about 1/4-inch thick.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together breadcrumbs, lemon pepper, and dried dill.
3. Pour the lemon juice into a second dish. Add chicken one piece at a time, first to the lemon juice, then to the breadcrumb mixture, turning to coat on all sides.
4. Heat olive oil in a large non-stick frying pan over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook, turning occasionally, about 10 minutes or until chicken is brown and fork tender.
